description_long: This is a pair of tall, knee-high boots featuring a two-tone design with a light beige or off-white shaft and brown leather foot and toe sections. The boots have a series of metallic buttons running vertically along the outer side, suggesting a historical or vintage style, possibly inspired by 18th or 19th-century gaiters. The shaft appears to be made of a soft, flexible material, likely leather or heavy canvas, while the foot and toe areas are constructed from a sturdier, brown leather. The interior is unlined and light in color, with no visible branding or logos. The boots are well-constructed, with clean seams and a slightly matte finish, and show no signs of wear or damage.
description: Tall, two-tone boots with a light shaft, brown leather foot, and side button closure, evoking a vintage or historical style. The boots are clean, well-made, and free of visible wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full row of metallic buttons and the contrast between the light shaft and brown leather foot.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the tall shafts, rounded toes, and the symmetrical alignment of both boots.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the button closure and the smooth, unadorned back of the boots.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, seam-lined backs of the shafts and the open tops.
